jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at FIITJEE
jsonLd.description:
Join the FIITJEE family as a Instructional Designer in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FIITJEE:
FIITJEE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE!
